teaser: Microsoft reportedly notified Texas state agencies and universities of a breach by Russian hackers, accessing emails through a compromised system. Agencies affected include the Texas Department of Transportation and Texas Workforce Commission. The hackers, part of the group Midnight Blizzard, stole emails from Microsoft executives.
